svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 120, 212), rgb(63, 166, 245)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 90, 158), rgb(107, 184, 243));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(40, 167, 69), rgb(43, 152, 68)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(30, 126, 52), rgb(91, 173, 110));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;

div.div: Inheritance: Policy & RBAC flow DOWN the tree

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 120, 212), rgb(63, 166, 245)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 90, 158), rgb(107, 184, 243));
